issues.description: Script requests GM_xmlhttpRequest permission but does not use it in the code, indicating unnecessary high privilege grant.
issues.recommendation: Remove unused GM_xmlhttpRequest grant to minimize permissions.

summary: The script exports chat history from specified websites to Markdown format without transmitting data externally or collecting sensitive user information. It does not perform remote code execution or use sensitive APIs. However, it requests GM_xmlhttpRequest permission which is not used, constituting permission overreach. No privacy-invasive behaviors or data exfiltration detected.
